# ZverTs

> An AI-powered, disciplined learning platform with sequential modules, strict watch-time tracking, quizzes, and verified certificates.

ZverTs helps learners master web development and other topics through video lessons, AI summaries, gamified progress, and proof-of-completion certificates.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the ZverTs learning platform.
- [Courses](/courses): Browse public courses and learning tracks.
- [Leaderboard](/leaderboard): Top learners by XP and streaks.
- [About](/info/about): Mission and vision of ZverTs.
- [FAQ](/info/faq): Frequently asked questions about ZverTs.
- [Help Center](/info/help): Self-service support topics.
- [Contact](/info/contact): How to reach the ZverTs team.
- [Affiliates](/info/affiliates): Affiliate program details.
- [Community](/info/community): Join the ZverTs learner community.
- [Refund Policy](/refund-policy): Refund terms and conditions.
